title: dracaena fasciata
intro: Dracaena fasciata, also known as the Dragon Tree, is a popular ornamental houseplant characterized by its striking upright growth habit and glossy, striped leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to repel insects and reduce inflammation. It is said to have health benefits such as improving air quality, reducing stress, and promoting a good night's sleep due to its ability to purify the air. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Dracaena fasciata plant can be used to make teas and infusions, which are believed to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties.
